docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DESAI, KUMAR AS TO DEFENDANT LATIMER, CLINCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESAI, KUMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATIMER, CLINCY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LATIMER, CLINCY HEARING SET FOR AUG-05-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED FEB-07-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LATIMER, CLINCY
